description: A stated or observed bias, perspective, or spin in news coverage

name.description: A label for the identified bias or perspective

direction.description: The direction or leaning of the bias (e.g., left-leaning, right-leaning, pro-government, critical)

description.description: A detailed description of the bias and how it manifests in coverage

evidence.description: Specific examples or evidence supporting the identified bias

source.description: The source or outlet where the bias was observed
